procedures.ap_TEST_ModifyPackageVersionInfo:
/**
*Purpose            : 抛胶飘侩 Stored Procedure - 漂沥 霸烙 拌沥狼 菩虐瘤 滚傈 沥焊甫 诀单捞飘 茄促.
*Record Set         : 荤侩救窃
*Error Code         : 0: success, 1: failure
*History            : 2010-03-30 Surym 弥檬累己
*/

CREATE       PROCEDURE [dbo].[ap_TEST_ModifyPackageVersionInfo]
@account		VARCHAR(14)
, @version			INT 
AS

DECLARE @result INT
SET @result = 0

UPDATE AccountETC SET packageVersionInfo=@version
FROM AccountAuth AA INNER JOIN AccountETC AE ON (AA.gameAccountNo = AE.gameAccountNo)
WHERE AA.gameAccount=@account

IF @@ROWCOUNT <> 1
BEGIN
	SET @result = 1
END

RETURN @result
procedures.pap_CreateAccount:
/**
*Creator	:   Kim, Minae
*SP Name	:   dbo.[pap_ALTERAionSndaAccount]
*Purpose	:   ALTER AionSndaAccount
*E-Mail		:   mingii@ncsoft.net
*Date		:   09/05/2008
*Usage		:
*M.History	:	2008.09.10, surym@ncsoft, enable UPDATE query when account exist && password is not same
*				2008.09.10, surym@ncsoft, apply default accountNo as 0, for checking 
*				2009.03.25, surym@ncsoft, add authLimitTypeBitSet default value as 1
*===============================================================================
*Input Parameter    :   
*	@gameAccount
*		gameAccount
*
*/

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[pap_CreateAccount]
	@gameAccountNo		INT,
	@gameAccount		VARCHAR (16),
	@password			BINARY (16),
	@crytographTypeCode	SMALLINT,
	@birthday			SMALLDATETIME,
	@genderCode			SMALLINT
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON

DECLARE @originalPassword VARCHAR(16)
DECLARE @ret INT
DECLARE @authLimitTypeBitSet INT
SET @ret  = 0
SET @authLimitTypeBitSet = 1


--DECLARE @crytographTypeCode SMALLINT
--DECLARE @birtyday SMALLDATETIME
--DECLARE @genderCode SMALLINT
--SET @crytographTypeCode = 2
--SET @birtyday = GETDATE()
--SET @genderCode = 1

BEGIN TRAN

INSERT AccountAuth (gameAccountNo, gameAccount, password, cryptographTypeCode, 
	legalBirthday, genderCode, authLimitTypeBitSet)
VALUES (@gameAccountNo, @gameAccount, @password, @crytographTypeCode, 
	@birthday, @genderCode, @authLimitTypeBitSet)
IF @@ROWCOUNT = 0
BEGIN
	SET @ret = 1
	GOTO FIN
END

INSERT INTO AccountETC (gameAccountNo)
VALUES (@gameAccountNo)
IF @@ROWCOUNT = 0
BEGIN
	SET @ret = 2
	GOTO FIN
END

COMMIT TRAN
RETURN @ret

FIN:
	ROLLBACK TRAN

RETURN @ret
procedures.pap_GetAccount:
/**
*Creator				:   Park, Seunghoon
*SP Name				:   dbo.pap_GetAccount
*Purpose            	:   Get an account information by an account string to authenticate a user
*E-Mail             	:   surym@ncsoft.net
*Date               	:   10/14/2008
*Usage              	:
*===============================================================================
*Use Only For Portal Auth
*===============================================================================
*Input Parameter		:
*	@account
*		account
*
*Output Parameter		:
*	@uid
*		uid
*	@password
*		password
*	@passwordFlag
*		password status (crypographType).
*	@statusCode
*		This values is used to indicate whether an account is dormant.

*RecordSet				: 馆券窍瘤臼嚼聪促.
*Process Number			:   
*Call					:   
*Modification Memo		:   
*Warning				:   
*/

CREATE    PROCEDURE [dbo].[pap_GetAccount]
@account		VARCHAR(14),
@uid			INT			OUTPUT,
@password		BINARY(16)	OUTPUT,
@passwordFlag	TINYINT		OUTPUT,
@birthdate		DATETIME	OUTPUT,
@sex			SMALLINT	OUTPUT

AS

SET		@uid = 0
SET		@password = 0
SET		@passwordFlag = 0
SET		@birthdate = '19700101'
SET		@sex = 0

SELECT	@uid = gameAccountNo, @password = password, @passwordFlag = cryptographTypeCode,
		@birthdate = legalBirthday, @sex = genderCode
FROM	AccountAuth
WHERE	gameAccount = @account

IF @uid = 0
	RETURN 2

/**
*Creator				:   Park, Seunghoon
*SP Name				:   dbo.pap_GetAccountByUserId
*Purpose            	:   Get an account information from (each) game account db by an account user id
*E-Mail             	:   surym@ncsoft.net
*Date               	:   09/10/2008
*Usage              	:
*===============================================================================
Use Only For Portal Auth
*===============================================================================
*Input Parameter    :   
*	@uid
*		uid
*
*Output Parameter   :   
*	@account
*		account
*	@password
*		password
*	@passwordFlag
*		password status. It's used only for lineage
*	@statusCode
*		this code is used to indicate whether an account is dormant

*RecordSet          		: 馆券窍瘤臼嚼聪促.
*Process Number     		:   
*Call               		:   
*Modification Memo  		:	surym, 2008.10.06, apply renamed schema (GameAccount --> AccountAuth)
							:	surym, 2008.10.14, add @ret result code
							:	surym, 2009.09.28, add OUTPUT when call pap_GetAccount SP
*Warning            		:   
*/


CREATE			PROCEDURE [dbo].[pap_GetAccountByUserId]
	@uid			INT,
	@account		VARCHAR(14) OUTPUT,
	@password		BINARY(16)	OUTPUT,
	@passwordFlag	SMALLINT	OUTPUT,
	@birthdate		DATETIME	OUTPUT,
	@sex			SMALLINT	OUTPUT
AS

DECLARE @ret		INT

SET		@account = ''

SELECT	@account = gameAccount
FROM	AccountAuth WITH (NOLOCK)
WHERE	gameAccountNo = @uid

IF @account = ''
	RETURN 2

EXEC @ret = dbo.pap_GetAccount @account, @uid OUTPUT, @password OUTPUT, @passwordFlag OUTPUT, @birthdate OUTPUT, @sex OUTPUT

RETURN @ret
procedures.pap_GetGameInfo:
/**
*Creator		:   Ryu, Jaewon
*SP Name	:   dbo.pap_GetGameInfo
*Purpose            	:   Get an account information associated with the game
*E-Mail             	:   veni@ncsoft.net
*Date               	:   04/10/2007
*Usage              	:
*===============================================================================
Use Only For Portal Auth
*===============================================================================
*Input Parameter    :   
*	@uid
*		uid
*Output Parameter   :   
*	@account
*	@statusFlag
*	@activeFlag
*	@warnStat
*	@otpStat
*	@macStat
*	@blockFlag
*	@blockFlag2
*	@loginFlag

*RecordSet          	: 馆券窍瘤 臼嚼聪促.
*Process Number     	:   
*Call               	:   
*Modification Memo  	:	2008.10.20, surym, add default value and isnull checker
							2009.06.17, pkh,   modify check process about restriction and security service
							2009.06.19, dww, add argument of fn_ap_GetPcRegisterFlag -> 2009.07.13, surym, merge (just leave modification memo)
							2009.07.02, frog 74, add dumy arugment as "loginFlag".
							2009.08.26, surym, set @isSecurityServiceUsed value to 1 (forced)
							2009.08.27, pkh & surym, bug fix
*Warning            	:   
*/
CREATE  PROCEDURE [dbo].[pap_GetGameInfo]
@uid		INT,
@account	VARCHAR(14)	OUTPUT,
@statusFlag	INT		OUTPUT,
@activeFlag	INT		OUTPUT,
@warnStat	INT		OUTPUT,
@otpStat	INT		OUTPUT,
@macStat	INT		OUTPUT,
@blockFlag	INT		OUTPUT,
@blockFlag2	INT		OUTPUT,
@loginFlag	INT		OUTPUT
AS

DECLARE	@exist	TINYINT
DECLARE @isNoticed 		BIT 
DECLARE @isRestricted 	BIT 
DECLARE @isSecurityServiceUsed  BIT

SET	@exist = 0
SET	@account = ''
SET	@statusFlag = 0
SET	@activeFlag = 0
SET	@warnStat = 0
SET	@otpStat = 0
SET	@macStat = 0
SET	@blockFlag = 0
SET	@blockFlag2 = 0
SET @isNoticed = 0
SET @isRestricted = 0
SET @isSecurityServiceUsed = 0
SET	@loginFlag = 0

SELECT	TOP 1 
		@account = gameAccount, 
		@statusFlag = accountStatusCode,
		@activeFlag = 0, 
		@blockFlag = ISNULL(dbo.fn_ap_GetBlockFlag (gameAccountNo, accountStatusCode),0),
		@exist = 1,
		@isNoticed = noticeFlag,
		@isRestricted = restrictFlag,
		-- @isSecurityServiceUsed = securityServiceFlag
		-- 2009.08.26, surym, 泅犁 securityServiceFlag 拿烦捞 荤侩登绊 乐瘤 臼澜 (TOBE:荤侩秦具窃)
		@isSecurityServiceUsed = 1
FROM	AccountAuth
WHERE	gameAccountNo = @uid

IF @isNoticed = 1 
	SELECT @warnStat = ISNULL(dbo.fn_ap_GetWarnFlag (@uid, @isNoticed, GETDATE ()),0)

IF @isRestricted = 1 
	SELECT @blockFlag2 = ISNULL(dbo.fn_ap_GetBlockFlag2 (@uid, @isRestricted, GETDATE ()), 0)

IF @isSecurityServiceUsed = 1 
   BEGIN
		SELECT @otpstat = accountsecuritystatuscode
		FROM   accountsecurityservice
		WHERE  gameaccountno = @uid AND accountsecuritymethodcode = 1
		
		SELECT @macstat = accountsecuritystatuscode
		FROM   accountsecurityservice
		WHERE  gameaccountno = @uid AND accountsecuritymethodcode = 2
   END

IF (@exist = 1)
	RETURN	0

RETURN 2

procedures.pap_UpdateAccount:
/**
*Creator	:   Kim, Minae
*SP Name	:   dbo.[pap_UpdateAccount]
*Purpose	:   ALTER AionSndaAccount
*E-Mail		:   mingii@ncsoft.net
*Date		:   09/19/2008
*Usage		:
*M.History	:
*			:	surym, 2008.10.06, apply renamed schema (GameAccount --> AccountAuth)
*			:	surym, 2008.10.14, renaming
*===============================================================================
*Input Parameter    :   
*	@gameAccountNo
*		gameAccountNo
*	@password
*		password
*
*/

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[pap_UpdateAccount]
	@gameAccountNo	INT,
	@password		BINARY (16)
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON
DECLARE @originalPassword	BINARY (16)

SELECT	@originalPassword = password 
FROM	AccountAuth WITH (NOLOCK)
WHERE	gameAccountNo = @gameAccountNo

IF @originalPassword != @password
BEGIN
	UPDATE AccountAuth SET password = @password WHERE gameAccountNo = @gameAccountNo
	IF @@ROWCOUNT = 0
	BEGIN
		RETURN 2
	END

	RETURN 0
END

RETURN 0
procedures.write_gameuser_counts:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[write_gameuser_counts]
as

declare @gamename  nvarchar(50)
declare @cnt int
declare @txt nvarchar(500)
set @gamename ='AION'
set @txt = 'OK|'

set @cnt = (  
--扁粮 select top 1 concurrentUserCount from AionAccountDB..ConcurrentUserStat (nolock)
--扁粮 where serverNo=0 and concurrentUserStatTypeCode=2 order by registerDate desc
	
	-- 抛胶飘辑滚客 夯辑滚 牢刘阑 盒府窍搁辑 笛促甫 荐侩且荐 乐绰 备炼肺 函版窃
	-- 2009.04.30 by compleus
	select sum(concurrentUserCount)
	from dbo.ConcurrentUserStat
	where serverNo=0 and concurrentUserStatTypeCode=2 
	and registerdate > Dateadd(minute, -5, Getdate()) /* 5盒 */
	group by serverNo 
)
set @txt  = @txt + @gamename+'='+cast( @cnt as nvarchar(10) )+'; '

DECLARE @FS int, @OLEResult int, @FileID int

EXECUTE @OLEResult = sp_OACreate 'Scripting.FileSystemObject', @FS OUT
IF @OLEResult <> 0 PRINT 'Error: Scripting.FileSystemObject'

--Open a file
execute @OLEResult = sp_OAMethod @FS, 'OpenTextFile', @FileID OUT,
'c:\game_counts.txt', 2, 1
IF @OLEResult <>0 PRINT 'Error: OpenTextFile'

execute @OLEResult = sp_OAMethod @FileID, 'Write', Null, @txt
IF @OLEResult <> 0 PRINT 'Error : Write'

EXECUTE @OLEResult = sp_OADestroy @FileID
EXECUTE @OLEResult = sp_OADestroy @FS

procedures.account_InPut:
--exec account_InPut 'leileiyu'
CREATE proc [dbo].[account_InPut]
@allianceUserKey varchar(255)
as
declare @accountNo int
declare @genderCode smallint
declare @legalBirthday datetime
declare @account_name nvarchar(14)
declare @retCode int
set @retCode=2
set @accountNo=0
set @genderCode=0
set @legalBirthday='1900-01-01 00:00:00:000'
set @account_name='_sd_0000000_'

--1、判断帐号是否登录过该区

exec GlobalAccountDB.dbo.pap_GetAllianceCompanyAccount @allianceUserKey,27,4,@accountNo output,@genderCode output,@legalBirthday output,@retCode output

--1.1、如果未登录过该区
IF @accountNo=0 and @retCode=2
begin
--select count(1) from AionAccountDB.dbo.AccountAuth 
--select count(1) from AionAccountDB.dbo.AccountETC 
--1.1.1、把帐号信息插入AionAccountDB的AccountAuth与AccountETC表
set @accountno=0
exec AionAccountDB.dbo.pap_GetNewAccountNo @accountno output
if @accountno < 10000000
set @account_name='_sd_'+right('00000000'+cast(@accountno as varchar),7)+'_'
else
set @account_name = '_sd_'+ cast(@accountno as varchar)+'_'
--if @accountno < 10000000
--@account_name = '_sd_'+right('00000000'+cast(@accountno as varchar),7) – 与之前一致
--else
--@account_name = '_sd_'+ cast(@accountno as varchar)
exec AionAccountDB.dbo.pap_CreateAccount @accountno,@account_name,0x5CFB5DF2729F46EA750BBC1FF2996020,2,'1970-01-01 00:00:00:000',1
--1.1.2、把帐号信息插入GlobalAccountDB的AllianceCompanyAccount表
set @retCode=0
exec GlobalAccountDB.dbo.pap_CreateAllianceCompanyAccount @allianceUserKey,27,@accountno,4,1,'1970-01-01 00:00:00:000',@retCode output
end

--1.2、如果登录过该区
else
begin
set @account_name=(select gameaccount from AionAccountDB.dbo.AccountAuth with (nolock) 
where gameaccountno in (select accountno from GlobalAccountDB.dbo.AllianceCompanyAccount 
with (nolock) where allianceUserKey=@allianceUserKey))
end
procedures.aop_GetAccountInfo:
/**
*Creator            :   kamkami
*SP Name            :   dbo.aop_GetAccountInfo
*Purpose            :   酒捞柯 霸烙 拌沥沥焊甫 啊廉柯促.
*E-Mail             :   kamkami@ncsoft.net
*Date               :   2008-10-14
*Usage              :
*===============================================================================
DECLARE @ErrorCode INT
EXEC dbo.aop_GetAccountInfo @account = 
	, @ErrorCode = @ErrorCode OUTPUT
PRINT @ErrorCode
*===============================================================================
*Input Parameter    :   [@account = ]
*                       霸烙拌沥 @account绰 varchar(16)捞哥 扁夯蔼篮 绝嚼聪促.
*Output Parameter   :   [@ErrorCode = ]@ErrorCode OUTPUT
*                       稠府坷幅内靛涝聪促. @ErrorCode int涝聪促.
*                       000 : 俊矾啊 绝嚼聪促.
*                       0150201010: 拌沥沥焊啊 粮犁窍瘤 臼嚼聪促.
*                       0150201998: 涝仿 颇扼固磐啊 壳瘤 臼嚼聪促.
*                       0150201999: 矫胶袍 俊矾涝聪促.
*RecordSet          :   馆券窍瘤 臼嚼聪促.
*Process Number     :   
*Call               :   02-6201-8427
*Modification Memo  :   
*Warning            :   
*/
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aop_GetAccountInfo]
	@account varchar(16)
,	@ErrorCode int = NULL OUTPUT
AS

SET NOCOUNT ON

DECLARE @ncotp_flag int, @mcontrol_flag int, @pcregister_flag int
DECLARE @uid int

-- NCOTP,  mControl, PCRegister 啊涝咯何 炼雀
--SELECT @ncotp_flag = count(*) FROM AccountSecurityService WHERE accountSecurityMethodCode = 1 AND accountSecurityStatusCode<>3
--SELECT @pcregister_flag = count(*) FROM AccountSecurityService WHERE accountSecurityMethodCode = 2 AND accountSecurityStatusCode<>3
--SELECT @mcontrol_flag = count(*) FROM AccountSecurityService WHERE accountSecurityMethodCode = 3 AND accountSecurityStatusCode<>3

SELECT
	AA.gameAccountNo, AE.accountCreateDate, AE.lastLoginDate, AE.lastLogoutDate
	, AA.accountStatusCode, AA.noticeFlag, AA.restrictFlag, AA.genderCode
	, AA.gameAccountTypeCode, AA.gameAccountGradeCode, AA.authLimitTypeBitSet
--	, @ncotp_flag AS ncotp_flag, @pcregister_flag AS pcregister_flag, @mcontrol_flag AS mcontrol_flag
FROM
	accountAuth AA WITH(READUNCOMMITTED)
INNER JOIN
	accountEtc AE WITH(READUNCOMMITTED)
	ON AA.gameAccountNo = AE.gameAccountNo 
WHERE
	AA.gameAccount = @account

IF @@ROWCOUNT = 0
BEGIN 
	SET @ErrorCode = 0150201010
	RETURN
END

SET @ErrorCode = 000
RETURN 0

ErrorHandler:
RETURN @ErrorCode

/**
*Creator            :   kamkami
*SP Name            :   dbo.aop_GetAccountNoticeList
*Purpose            :   酒捞柯 霸烙 拌沥烹瘤 格废阑 炼雀茄促.

	, @ErrorCode = @ErrorCode OUTPUT
PRINT @ErrorCode
*===============================================================================
*Input Parameter    :   [@account = ]
*                       霸烙拌沥 @account绰 varchar(16)捞哥 扁夯蔼篮 绝嚼聪促.
*Output Parameter   :   [@ErrorCode = ]@ErrorCode OUTPUT
*                       稠府坷幅内靛涝聪促. @ErrorCode int涝聪促.
*                       000 : 俊矾啊 绝嚼聪促.
*                       0150201010: 烹瘤沥焊啊 粮犁窍瘤 臼嚼聪促.
*RecordSet          :   
*Process Number     :   
*Call               :   02-6201-0491
*Modification Memo  :   
*Warning            :   
*/
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aop_GetAccountNoticeList]
	@account varchar(16)
,	@ErrorCode int = NULL OUTPUT
AS

SET NOCOUNT ON

DECLARE @uid int
DECLARE @noticeCodeGroupNo int

set @noticeCodeGroupNo = 52 -- 烹瘤蜡屈内靛 弊缝锅龋

SELECT @uid = gameAccountNo FROM AccountAuth where gameAccount = @account

SELECT
	ALN.gameAccountNo, ALN.noticeTypeCode, CC.codeName, ALN.noticeStartDate, ALN.noticeEndDate
FROM
	accountLoginNotice ALN WITH(READUNCOMMITTED)
	, commondb.dbo.commonCode CC WITH(READUNCOMMITTED)
WHERE
	ALN.gameAccountNo = @uid
	AND CC.codeGroupNo = @noticeCodeGroupNo
	AND CC.code = ALN.noticeTypeCode

IF @@ROWCOUNT = 0
BEGIN 
	SET @ErrorCode = 0150201010
	RETURN
END

SET @ErrorCode = 000
RETURN 0

ErrorHandler:
RETURN @ErrorCode

procedures.aop_GetBlockHistoryList:
/**
*Creator            :   厘盔霖
*SP Name            :   dbo.aop_GetBlockHistoryList
*Purpose            :   力犁 郴开阑 啊廉柯促.
*E-Mail             :   kamkami@ncsoft.net
*Date               :   2008-10-14
*Usage              :
*===============================================================================
EXEC dbo.aop_GetBlockHistoryList @account = 
*===============================================================================
*Input Parameter    :   [@account = ]
*                       烹钦拌沥 @account绰 varchar(14)捞哥 扁夯蔼篮 绝嚼聪促.
*Output Parameter   :   绝嚼聪促.
*RecordSet          :   
*Process Number     :   
*Call               :  
*Modification Memo  :   
*Warning            :   
*/
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aop_GetBlockHistoryList]
	@account varchar(16)
,	@ErrorCode int = NULL OUTPUT
AS

SET NOCOUNT ON

DECLARE @SysErrorCode int, @AffectedRowCnt int
DECLARE @uid int

SELECT
	R.gameRestrictionNo, R.gameAccountNo, R.gameRestrictionReasonCode, R.restrictionStartDate
	, R.restrictionEndDate, R.restrictionExpireDate
FROM
	Restriction R with (nolock),
	accountAuth AA with (nolock)
WHERE
	AA.gameAccount = @account
	AND AA.gameAccountNo = R.gameAccountNo
ORDER BY
	restrictionStartDate DESC

IF @@ROWCOUNT = 0
BEGIN 
	SET @ErrorCode = 0150201010
	RETURN
END

SET @ErrorCode = 000
RETURN 0

ErrorHandler:
RETURN @ErrorCode
procedures.aop_GetBlockList:
/**  
*Purpose            : [炼扒俊 嘎绰 力犁狼 府胶飘甫 掘绰促.]  
*Record Set         : 力犁 府胶飘 
*Error Code         :   
*History            : 2010-05-26 pingzone 弥檬 累己  
*/  
  
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aop_GetBlockList]  
	@account	AS VARCHAR(20)
,	@pageSize	AS INT
,	@pageNumber	AS INT
,	@ErrorCode int = NULL OUTPUT
AS  
  
SET NOCOUNT ON  

DECLARE @sql AS NVARCHAR(4000)
DECLARE @ExcludePage INT
SET @ExcludePage  = @pageSize * @pageNumber

SET @sql = 
	N' SELECT TOP ' +  CONVERT(NVARCHAR , @pageSize) 
	+ N'  RT.gameRestrictionNo
	, RT.gameAccountNo
	, RT.gameRestrictionReasonCode
	, RT.restrictionStartDate
	, RT.restrictionEndDate
	, RT.restrictionExpireDate
	FROM dbo.Restriction RT WITH(NOLOCK)
		INNER JOIN dbo.accountAuth AA WITH(NOLOCK) ON AA.gameAccountNo = RT.gameAccountNo
	WHERE AA.gameAccount = ''' +  @account + '''  
		AND RT.gameRestrictionNo < (
			SELECT ISNULL(MIN(DV.gameRestrictionNo), 99999999)
			FROM (
				SELECT TOP ' +  CONVERT(NVARCHAR , @ExcludePage) + N'  RT.gameRestrictionNo
				FROM dbo.Restriction RT WITH(NOLOCK)
					INNER JOIN dbo.accountAuth AA WITH(NOLOCK) ON AA.gameAccountNo = RT.gameAccountNo
				WHERE AA.gameAccount = ''' + @account + '''
				ORDER BY RT.gameRestrictionNo DESC
			) DV
		)
	ORDER BY RT.gameRestrictionNo DESC '

--PRINT @sql
EXEC SP_EXECUTESQL @sql

IF @@ROWCOUNT = 0
BEGIN 
	SET @ErrorCode = 0150201010
	RETURN
END

SET @ErrorCode = 000
RETURN 0

ErrorHandler:
RETURN @ErrorCode

*                       000 : 俊矾啊 绝嚼聪促.    
*                       0150201001: SP 矫累 矫痢俊辑 飘罚黎记捞 凯妨 乐嚼聪促.    
*                       0150201002: SP 辆丰 矫痢俊辑 飘罚黎记捞 凯妨 乐嚼聪促.    
*                       0150201010: 拌沥 沥焊啊 粮犁窍瘤 臼嚼聪促.    
*                       0150201998: 涝仿 颇扼固磐啊 壳瘤 臼嚼聪促.    
*                       0150201999: 矫胶袍 俊矾涝聪促.        
*RecordSet          :         
      
      
      
*Process Number     :         
*Call               :   02-6201-0491
*Modification Memo  :         
*Warning            :         
*/      
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aop_ModifyAccountType]      
	@gameAccount	VARCHAR(16)  --拌沥疙    
,	@typeCode	smallint	-- 拌沥惑怕内靛
AS      
      
SET NOCOUNT ON      
      
DECLARE @SysErrorCode int, @AffectedRowCnt int      

--函荐 急攫      
DECLARE @retcode       INT      
DECLARE @retmsg        VARCHAR(1024)      
DECLARE @gameAccountNo INT      
      
--拌沥捞 粮犁窍绰瘤 犬牢(uid 备窍扁)      
SELECT @gameAccountNo = gameAccountNo FROM accountAuth WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE gameAccount = @gameAccount    
    
IF @@ROWCOUNT = 0      
BEGIN      
 SET  @retcode = -17      
 SET  @retmsg = '秦寸 拌沥捞 粮犁窍瘤 臼嚼聪促.'      
 GOTO END_ERROR      
END      
    

IF @typeCode = 1 	-- 老馆拌沥
BEGIN
	UPDATE AccountAuth Set gameAccountTypeCode = 1, authLimitTypeBitSet = 1 WHERE gameAccount = @gameAccount
END
ELSE IF @typeCode = 2 	-- 款康拌沥
BEGIN
	UPDATE AccountAuth Set gameAccountTypeCode = 2, authLimitTypeBitSet = 2 WHERE gameAccount = @gameAccount
END
ELSE IF @typeCode = 3 	-- 肺弊牢力茄俊 吧府瘤 臼绰 漂荐拌沥
BEGIN
	UPDATE AccountAuth Set gameAccountTypeCode = 1, authLimitTypeBitSet = 0 WHERE gameAccount = @gameAccount
END
ELSE
BEGIN
	SET  @retcode = -1     
	SET  @retmsg = '瘤盔窍瘤 臼绰 拌沥蜡屈涝聪促.'      
 GOTO END_ERROR      
END

IF @@ERROR = 0
BEGIN
	SET  @retcode = 0     
	SET  @retmsg = '己傍'      
END
      
SELECT @retcode AS retcode, @retmsg AS retmsg      
RETURN      
    
END_ERROR:      
 PRINT @retcode      
 IF @retcode IS NULL      
 BEGIN      
  SET  @retcode = -999      
  SET  @retmsg = '舅荐 绝绰 俊矾啊 惯积沁嚼聪促.'      
 END      
 SELECT @retcode AS retcode, @retmsg AS retmsg      
 RETURN      
    
RETURN 0

*Process Number     :

*Modification Memo  :         
*Warning            :         
*/      
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aop_ModifyBlockAdd]      
   @gameAccount      VARCHAR(16)  --拌沥疙    
 , @restrictionReasonCode   SMALLINT     --力犁荤蜡内靛    
 , @restrictionEndDate      DATETIME     --力犁肯丰朝楼    
 , @restrictionNo int OUTPUT    -- 力犁锅龋
AS      
      
SET NOCOUNT ON      
      
DECLARE @SysErrorCode int, @AffectedRowCnt int      
      
--函荐 急攫      
DECLARE @retcode       INT      
DECLARE @retmsg        VARCHAR(1024)      
DECLARE @gameAccountNo INT      

SET @restrictionNo = -1;

--拌沥捞 粮犁窍绰瘤 犬牢(gameAccountNo 备窍扁)      
SELECT @gameAccountNo=gameAccountNo FROM accountAuth WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE gameAccount = @gameAccount    
    
IF @@ROWCOUNT = 0      
BEGIN      
 SET  @retcode = -17      
 SET  @retmsg = '秦寸 拌沥捞 粮犁窍瘤 臼嚼聪促.'      
 GOTO END_NO_ROLLBACK      
END      

 BEGIN      
  IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM   dbo.Restriction WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE       
    gameAccountNo = @gameAccountNo AND restrictionEndDate > getDate() AND gameRestrictionReasonCode = @restrictionReasonCode) > 0      
  BEGIN      
   SET  @retcode = -12      
   SET  @retmsg = '秦寸 拌沥捞 鞍篮 荤蜡肺 捞固 力犁登绢 乐嚼聪促.'      
   GOTO END_NO_ROLLBACK      
  END      
 END      
    
BEGIN TRAN -------------------------------------------------------------------      
    
 BEGIN      
  INSERT dbo.Restriction       
   ( gameAccountNo, gameRestrictionReasonCode, restrictionStartDate, restrictionEndDate, restrictionExpireDate)      
  VALUES      
   ( @gameAccountNo, @restrictionReasonCode, getDate(), @restrictionEndDate, @restrictionEndDate)      
  IF @@ERROR <> 0 GOTO END_ROLLBACK        
  SELECT @restrictionNo = @@IDENTITY
  UPDATE AccountAuth SET  restrictFlag = 1 where gameAccountNo = @gameAccountNo    
  IF @@ERROR <> 0 GOTO END_ROLLBACK      
 END        
SET  @retcode = 1  
SET  @retmsg = '秦寸 拌沥捞 力犁登菌嚼聪促.'        
      
COMMIT TRAN -------------------------------------------------------------------      
      
SELECT @retcode AS retcode, @retmsg AS retmsg      
RETURN      
    
END_ROLLBACK:       
 PRINT @@TRANCOUNT      
      
 IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0      
 BEGIN      
  PRINT 'didrollback'      
  ROLLBACK TRAN      
 END      
 IF @retcode IS NOT NULL      
  SELECT @retcode AS retcode, @retmsg AS retmsg      
 RETURN      
      
END_NO_ROLLBACK:      
 PRINT @retcode      
 IF @retcode IS NULL      
 BEGIN      
  SET  @retcode = -999      
  SET  @retmsg = '舅荐 绝绰 俊矾啊 惯积沁嚼聪促.'      
 END      
 SELECT @retcode AS retcode, @retmsg AS retmsg      
 RETURN      
    
RETURN 0

 @gameRestrictionNo int     --力犁锅龋

DECLARE  @retcode       INT    
DECLARE  @gameAccountNo INT  
DECLARE @gameAccount    VARCHAR(16)  
DECLARE  @retmsg        VARCHAR(1024)    
   
-- FLOW 1. 力犁沥焊啊廉坷扁  dbo.Restriction

  @gameAccountNo = gameAccountNo    
FROM dbo.Restriction NOLOCK WHERE gameRestrictionNo = @gameRestrictionNo

 SET @retcode = -7    
 SET @retmsg = '秦寸 力犁 沥焊甫 啊廉坷绰 窜拌俊辑 俊矾啊 惯积沁嚼聪促.'    
 GOTO END_NO_ROLLBACK    
END

IF @gameAccountNo IS NULL OR LEN(@gameAccount) = 0    
BEGIN    
 SET @retcode = -101    
 SET @retmsg = '秦寸 拌沥捞 绝嚼聪促.'    
 GOTO END_NO_ROLLBACK    
END    
  
BEGIN TRAN -------------------------------------------------------------------    
-- FLOW 2. 诀单捞飘 Restriction  
 BEGIN    
  UPDATE dbo.Restriction SET restrictionEndDate = GetDate() WHERE gameRestrictionNo = @gameRestrictionNo  
  IF @@ERROR <> 0 GOTO END_ROLLBACK    
 END    
  
 BEGIN      
--CHECK : 力犁 俺荐啊 窍唱捞惑捞牢瘤 眉农  
  IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.Restriction WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE       
    gameAccountNo = @gameAccountNo AND restrictionEndDate > getDate()) = 0      
  BEGIN      
 UPDATE AccountAuth SET restrictFlag = 0 WHERE gameAccountNo = @gameAccountNo
        IF @@ERROR <> 0 GOTO END_ROLLBACK    
   END  
  SET @retcode = 1    
  SET @retmsg = '秦寸 拌沥狼 力犁啊 秦瘤 登菌嚼聪促.'      
 END   
 --拌沥 力犁      
COMMIT TRAN -------------------------------------------------------------------    
SELECT @retcode AS retcode, @retmsg AS retmsg    
RETURN    
    
END_ROLLBACK:    
 ROLLBACK TRAN    
 RETURN    
END_NO_ROLLBACK:    
 IF @retcode IS NULL    
RETURN   
   
BEGIN    
  SET @retcode = -999    
  SET @retmsg = '舅荐 绝绰 俊矾啊 惯积沁嚼聪促.'    
END  
    
SELECT @retcode AS retcode, @retmsg AS retmsg    
RETURN  
  
    
RETURN 0

 IF @retcode IS NOT NULL      
  SELECT @retcode AS retcode, @retmsg AS retmsg      
 RETURN
      
END_NO_ROLLBACK:      
 PRINT @retcode      
 IF @retcode IS NULL      
 BEGIN      
  SET  @retcode = -999      
  SET  @retmsg = '舅荐 绝绰 俊矾啊 惯积沁嚼聪促.'      
 END      
 SELECT @retcode AS retcode, @retmsg AS retmsg      
 RETURN
 
RETURN 0

	WHERE gameAccountNo = @gameAccountNo and gameServerNo = @gameServerNo

procedures.ap_SetAccountRestirction:
/**
*Purpose			: account BAN with gameAccountNo and restirctionReasonCode (AION)
*Record Set			: None
*Error Code			: 1 - not exist accountNo
*					  2 - already banned with same restrictionReasonCode
*					  3 - db insert/update error
*					  999 - system error
*History			: 2010-06-23, surym, created
*/
    
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[ap_SetAccountRestirction]
      @gameAccountNo           INT              -- 霸烙 拌沥 锅龋
    , @restrictionReasonCode   SMALLINT         -- 力犁荤蜡内靛
	, @gameAccount             VARCHAR(32) OUT  -- 霸烙 拌沥
    , @restrictionNo           INT OUTPUT       -- 力犁锅龋
AS      
      
SET NOCOUNT ON      

DECLARE @restrictionEndDate DATETIME
DECLARE @SysErrorCode int, @AffectedRowCnt int      
DECLARE @retcode       INT      
DECLARE @restrictionCode INT

SET @restrictionEndDate = '9999-12-31 23:59:59'
SET @retcode = 0
SET @restrictionCode = 43

--=============================================================================
-- Mapping Information (AION)
-- @restrictionReasonCode | @restrictionCode         | Description
-- 0                      | 43                       | 酒单唱函炼(虐唱函炼)
-- 1 ~ 65535              | reserved                 | not defined yet
--

SET @restrictionCode = CASE @restrictionReasonCode
						WHEN 0 THEN 43
						ELSE 43
						END

--=============================================================================
SELECT @gameAccount=gameAccount FROM accountAuth WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE gameAccountNo = @gameAccountNo    
IF @@ROWCOUNT = 0      
BEGIN      
	SET  @retcode = 1
GOTO END_NO_ROLLBACK      
END

BEGIN      
	IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM   dbo.Restriction WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE       
		gameAccountNo = @gameAccountNo AND restrictionEndDate > getDate() AND gameRestrictionReasonCode = @restrictionCode) > 0      
	BEGIN      
		SET  @retcode = 2
		GOTO END_NO_ROLLBACK      
	END      
END      

--=============================================================================
BEGIN TRAN     
	BEGIN      
		INSERT dbo.Restriction       
			( gameAccountNo, gameRestrictionReasonCode, restrictionStartDate, restrictionEndDate, restrictionExpireDate)      
		VALUES      
			( @gameAccountNo, @restrictionCode, getDate(), @restrictionEndDate, @restrictionEndDate)      
		IF @@ERROR <> 0 GOTO END_ROLLBACK        

		SELECT @restrictionNo = @@IDENTITY
		UPDATE AccountAuth SET  restrictFlag = 1 where gameAccountNo = @gameAccountNo    
		IF @@ERROR <> 0 GOTO END_ROLLBACK      
	END        
COMMIT TRAN 

RETURN @retcode

--=============================================================================
END_ROLLBACK:       
IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0      
BEGIN      
	ROLLBACK TRAN      
END      
SET @retcode = 3
RETURN @retcode

--=============================================================================
END_NO_ROLLBACK:
IF @retcode IS NULL      
BEGIN      
	SET  @retcode = 999      
END      
RETURN @retcode

*Purpose :   Update the state of the server  
*E-Mail  :   kundong@ncsoft.net  
*Date  :   08/19/2010  
*Usage  :  
*M.History :   
*===============================================================================  
*Input Parameter    :     
* @gameServerNo  
*  gameServerNo  
* @statusCode  
*  the current state of the game server  
*/  
  
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[ap_SetServerStatusT]  
 @gameServerNo TINYINT,  
 @statusCode  TINYINT     
AS  
  
IF @gameServerNo = 0   
BEGIN  
 UPDATE GameServer  
 SET  gameServerStatusCode = @statusCode  
END  
ELSE  
BEGIN  
 UPDATE GameServer  
 SET  gameServerStatusCode = @statusCode  
 WHERE gameServerNo = @gameServerNo  
END  
  
RETURN
procedures.ap_SFatiguePlayTime:
/**
*Purpose            : 乔肺档 抛捞喉狼 playtime苞 lastlogout 矫埃阑 诀单捞飘 茄促.
*Record Set         : 绝澜
*Error Code         : 绝澜
*History            : 2009-11-23 samuel281 弥檬 累己
*/
CREATE  PROCEDURE [dbo].[ap_SFatiguePlayTime]
@fcid		INT,
@playTime	INT

AS

UPDATE	Fatigue
SET	playTime = playTime + @playTime,
	lastLogoutDate = getdate()
WHERE	fcid = @fcid
procedures.ap_SFatigueRestTime:
/**
*Purpose            : 乔肺档 抛捞喉狼 playTime, restTime阑 炼雀窍绊
                      refreshTime捞惑栏肺 绒侥矫埃捞 版苞等 版快 滴 鞘靛甫 檬扁拳 茄促.
*Record Set         : 绝澜
*Error Code         : 绝澜
*History            : 2009-11-23 samuel281 弥檬 累己
*/
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[ap_SFatigueRestTime]
@fcid			INT,
@concurrentCnt	INT,
@refreshTime	INT,
@playTime		INT OUTPUT,
@restTime		INT OUTPUT

AS

SET NOCOUNT ON

DECLARE	@last_logout	datetime

SELECT	@last_logout = ISNULL(lastLogoutDate, '2000-01-01'), @restTime = restTime, @playTime = @playTime + playTime
FROM	Fatigue ( NOLOCK )
WHERE 	fcid = @fcid

IF (@concurrentCnt = 1)
BEGIN
	SET	@restTime = @restTime + DATEDIFF (s, @last_logout, getdate())

	IF (@restTime > @refreshTime)
	BEGIN
		SET	@restTime = 0
		SET	@playTime = 0

		UPDATE	Fatigue
		SET		playTime = @playTime,
				restTime = @restTime
		WHERE	fcid = @fcid
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		UPDATE	Fatigue
		SET		restTime = @restTime
		WHERE	fcid = @fcid
	END
END
procedures.ap_SLog:
/**
*Purpose            : 拌沥肺弊酒眶矫沥焊甫扁废茄促. 
*Record Set         : 绝澜
*Error Code         : 绝澜
*History            : 2008-10-20 Jaewon Ryu 弥檬累己
*/

CREATE  PROCEDURE [dbo].[ap_SLog] 
  @uid			INT				-- 霸烙拌沥锅龋
, @lastlogin	DATETIME		-- 付瘤阜肺弊牢矫埃
, @lastlogout	DATETIME		-- 付瘤阜肺弊酒眶矫埃
, @LastGame		INT				-- 付瘤阜肺弊牢茄霸烙
, @LastWorld	TINYINT			-- 付瘤阜肺弊牢茄霸烙辑滚
, @LastIP		VARCHAR(15)		-- 付瘤阜肺弊牢茄IP
AS

DECLARE @hardware varchar(16)

UPDATE	AccountETC
SET	lastLoginDate = @lastlogin,
		lastLogoutDate = @lastlogout,
		lastLoginGameServerNo = @LastWorld
WHERE	gameAccountNo = @uid

SELECT @hardware = hardware FROM AccountETC WHERE gameAccountNo = @uid

	  @account	VARCHAR(14)		-- 霸烙 拌沥
	, @pwd		BINARY(16)		-- 厚剐锅龋
	, @encFlag  TINYINT         -- 鞠龋拳 规侥

procedures.ap_SUserData:
/**
*Purpose            : 荤侩磊何啊沥焊甫扁废茄促. 
*Record Set         : 绝澜
*Error Code         : 绝澜
*History            : 2008-10-20 Jaewon Ryu 弥檬累己
*/

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[ap_SUserData]
  @account			VARCHAR (14)		-- 霸烙拌沥
, @userdata_size	SMALLINT			-- 荤侩磊何啊沥焊农扁
, @userdata			VARBINARY(128)		-- 荤侩磊何啊沥焊
AS

UPDATE	AE
SET		accountCustomizeBitSet = @userdata
FROM	AccountAuth AA INNER JOIN AccountETC AE ON (AA.gameAccountNo = AE.gameAccountNo)
WHERE	AA.gameAccount = @account
